description_long: This bungalow features a low-pitched, hipped roof with gray shingles and a wide overhang, providing ample shade to the surrounding wooden porch. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the darker base trim and the wooden deck that wraps around two sides of the house. The front entrance is recessed under the roof, offering a sheltered entryway, while the porch extends outwards, creating a welcoming outdoor space. Windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, with several on the visible sides and a blank rear wall. The structure sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, bordered by a few vertical fence panels. The overall design is compact and single-storied, emphasizing horizontal lines and open outdoor living areas.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hipped gray shingle roof, light exterior walls, and a spacious wooden porch set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide wooden porch, and overhanging hipped roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the window arrangement, side porch, and a section of the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a blank wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the roof's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended wooden porch and additional fence panels.
